title: sphaerolobium racemulosum
intro: Sphaerolobium racemulosum, also known as the dropper or cluster globe-pea, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sphaerolobium racemulosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
